final:
// // This module performs bitwise NOT operations on two 64-bit inputs based on the opcode.
module ALU_64bit (  
    input [63:0] A,  
    input [63:0] B,  
    input [2:0] opcode,  
    output reg [63:0] result  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (opcode)  
            3'b000: result = A + B;       // ADD  
            3'b001: result = A - B;       // SUB  
            3'b010: result = A & B;       // AND  
            3'b011: result = A | B;       // OR  
            3'b100: result = A ^ B;       // XOR  
            default: result = 64'b0;      // Default case  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module performs bitwise NOT operations on two 64-bit inputs based on the opcode.
